note_text: Wound note - Leftplantar. Meas 1.6x2.4x0.5cm. None serosang drainage, no odor. Wound bed 72% gran, 28% slough. Periwound macerated. Alginate dsg applied. Pt c/o discomfort w/ dsg change. Dr. Kaczmarek notified.
